zh.lifeSummary: Lady Majory Dunbar是Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March和Christina Seton的女兒，於1389年出生在英國蘇格蘭易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴鄧巴。她於1404年與Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和5個女兒的父母。她去世於1429年4月23日之後在英國蘇格蘭藍納可爾克勞福德，埋葬在蘇格蘭。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Lady Majory Dunbar是Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March和Christina Seton的女儿，于1389年出生在英国苏格兰易亞斯特 洛迪安鄧巴鄧巴。她于1404年与Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford在英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和5个女儿的父母。她去世于1429年4月23日之后在英国苏格兰藍納可爾克勞福德，埋葬在苏格兰。

nameMeanings.name: Dunbar
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Dunbar, a place on the North Sea coast near Edinburgh, named with Gaelic dùn ‘fort’ + barr ‘top, summit’.

History: A family of this name were granted the lands of Dunbar by Malcolm III (1058–1093), and later acquired the earldoms of Dunbar and March. These earldoms were then withdrawn from the family by James I in 1434.

nameMeanings.name: Lady
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Middle English lavedi, levedi, ladi ‘lady, female head of a household, woman, wife’ (Old English hlǣfdige). As a man's name it may have been used in mockery, or be short for occupational names such as Ladyman.
Hungarian (Ládi): habitational name for someone from Lád in Borsod County or Lad in Somogy County.

variants.name: Lada
meanings: Of uncertain origin. If not simply an invention, it may have been devised as a feminine equivalent of   Alan   (of which it is an anagram), or a shortened form of   Alana .  It seems to have been first used by the American film actress  Lana Turner  (  1920–1995 ), whose original name was  Julia .

nameMeanings.name: Majory
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: variant of Major , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Major
meanings: English (of Norman origin): from the personal name Malg(i)er, Maug(i)er, an Old French form of ancient Germanic Madalgar(i) (see Mauger ).
Hungarian: from a shortened form of majorosgazda (see Majoros ) or a derivative of German Meyer .
Polish, Czech, and Slovak: from the military rank major (derived from Latin maior ‘greater’), a word related to English mayor and the German surname Meyer .

en.lifeSummary: Lady Majory Dunbar was born in 1389, in Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scotland, United Kingdom as the daughter of Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March and Christina Seton. She married Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford in 1404, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 5 daughters. She died after 23 April 1429, in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, and was buried in Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lady Majory Dunbar est née en 1389, à Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, fille de Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March et Christina Seton. Elle a épousé Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford en 1404, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 5 filles. Elle est décédée après 23 avril 1429, à Crawford, Lanarkshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Écosse.

Sie hat 1404 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Sie starb nach 23. April 1429 in Crawford, Lanarkshire, Schottland, United Kingdom und wurde in Scotland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Lady Majory Dunbar è nata il nel 1389 nel Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Scozia, Regno Unito come figlia di Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March e Christina Seton. Lei sposato Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford nel 1404, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 5 figlie. Morì dopo il 23 aprile 1429, nel Crawford, Lanarkshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, e fu sepolta a Scotland.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Majory Dunbarは1389年にイギリススコットランドエアスト ロスアンダンバーダンバーでSir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of MarchとChristina Setonの娘として生まれた。1404年にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードでAlexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawfordと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼女は1429年4月23日以後にイギリススコットランドラナルクシュアイアクラウフォードで死去し，スコットランドにて埋葬された。

ko.Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotlan: 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Majory Dunbar(은)는 1389년 영국 스코틀랜드 이스트 로스이언 던바 던바에서 Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March(와)과 Christina Seton의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1404년 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1429년 4월 23일 이후 영국 스코틀랜드 랜아르크실르 크롤퍼드에서 사망했으며 스컷랜드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Lady Majory Dunbar nasceu em 1389, em Dunbar, Dunbar, East Lothian, Escócia, United Kingdom filha de Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March e Christina Seton. Ela casou-se com Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford em 1404, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 5 filhas. Ela faleceu após 23 de abril de 1429, em Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, e foi sepultada em Scotland.

ru.Dunbar, Dunbar, Haddingtonshire, Scotlan: дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Lady Majory Dunbar родилась в 1389 г. в местности дунбар, дунбар, эаст лотян, Шотландия, Великобритания. Её родителей звали Sir George Dunbar 10th Earl of Dunbar, 4th Earl of March и Christina Seton. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Alexander Lindsay 2nd Earl of Crawford в 1404 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 5 дочерей. Она умерла после 23 апрель 1429 г. в местности кравфорд, ланаркшир, Шотландия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности Шотландия.

Murió después de 23 de abril de 1429, en Crawford, Lanarkshire, Escocia, Reino Unido, y fue sepultada en Scotland.
